positive: A central composition featuring a stylized, whimsical deep-sea bioluminescence scene. Focus on large, abstract jellyfish and glowing coral formations suspended in dark, oceanic depths. The primary colors should be vibrant neon blues, electric turquoise, and soft magenta, creating a strong contrast against the deep black background. Use clean, stylized silhouettes and glowing outlines to maximize print impact. The art style should be a blend of modern graphic illustration and watercolor wash, ensuring clean lines and high contrast. Ensure the composition is perfectly centered and designed for circular cropping.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, realistic, blur, noise, grainy, text, signature, watermark, logo, cropped, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, oversaturated
